prose:
The Fukui reactivity analysis for phenol has been completed using Density Functional Theory.

**Fukui Reactivity Indices for Phenol** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: provided by `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz`. SCF converged.

The most electrophilic site (highest f+ value) is Carbon atom 3 (0-indexed: 2) with an f+ value of 2.10283.
The most nucleophilic site (highest f- value) is Oxygen atom 1 (0-indexed: 0) with an f- value of 0.16201.

Fukui indices for each atom:

| Atom Index (0-based) | Symbol | Fukui+ (Electrophilic) | Fukui- (Nucleophilic) | Dual Descriptor |
|----------------------|--------|------------------------|-----------------------|-----------------|
| 0                    | O      | -0.9951                | 0.1620                | -1.1572         |
| 1                    | C      | 0.3993                 | 0.0488                | 0.3506          |
| 2                    | C      | 2.1028                 | 0.0710                | 2.0319          |
| 3                    | C      | 1.6197                 | 0.0705                | 1.5492          |
| 4                    | C      | -0.3420                | 0.0267                | -0.3687         |
| 5                    | C      | -0.2891                | 0.0209                | -0.3101         |
| 6                    | C      | 1.3080                 | 0.1235                | 1.1845          |
| 7                    | H      | -0.7339                | 0.0823                | -0.8162         |
| 8                    | H      | -0.2747                | 0.0881                | -0.3628         |
| 9                    | H      | -0.9171                | 0.0811                | -0.9982         |
| 10                   | H      | -0.6299                | 0.0805                | -0.7104         |
| 11                   | H      | -0.2959                | 0.0935                | -0.3894         |
| 12                   | H      | 0.0479                 | 0.0510                | -0.0031         |

A plot summarizing the Fukui indices is available at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/argo_gemini-2.5-flash/20260704-190317_phenol_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`.
